title: Chapter 47: Krieg Threatens the Baratie
main_description: Don Krieg’s shadow falls over the Baratie, turning the restaurant into a target. At the same time, Nami’s departure splits the crew’s priorities and points toward the next major conflict.
key_events: Don Krieg’s forces threaten the restaurant.
The Baratie cooks and Straw Hats prepare for conflict.
Nami’s actions pull the story toward her own unresolved past.
